stemHtml: What factors contribute to the formation of User Equivalent Range Error (UERE)?

options.a: Position Dilution of Precision (PDOP) and Ephemeris Error (EE).
options.b: Geometric Dilution of Precision (GDOP) and Ionospheric Delay.
options.c: Satellite Clock Error and Tropospheric Delay.
options.d: Combination of various errors including Selective Availability (SA), Ephemeris Error (EE), Satellite Clock Error, and Atmospheric Delays.
